software engineer.title: Software Engineer
software engineer.description: Design, develop, test, and maintain software applications and systems to meet user needs and organizational goals.
daily_tasks: Write clean, scalable, and efficient code.
Collaborate with product managers and designers on system architecture.
Debug and fix software defects in existing codebases.
Review peers' code and provide technical feedback.
Deploy applications to cloud environments (AWS, Azure) using CI/CD pipelines.

data scientist.title: Data Scientist
data scientist.description: Extract actionable insights from vast amounts of structured and unstructured data using advanced analytics and machine learning techniques.
daily_tasks: Build, tune, and deploy machine learning and deep learning models.
Clean, aggregate, and visualize large datasets.
Design A/B tests to measure product changes and business impact.
Communicate complex statistical findings to non-technical stakeholders.
Develop predictive models for user behavior or financial forecasting.

web developer.title: Web Developer
web developer.description: Build high-performing, interactive, and responsive websites and web applications ensuring an optimal user experience.
daily_tasks: Translate UI/UX designs into functional web components using HTML/CSS/JS.
Build dynamic single-page applications (SPAs) with frameworks like React or Vue.
Optimize web pages for maximum speed and scalability.
Ensure cross-browser compatibility and mobile responsiveness.
Integrate frontend code with backend RESTful APIs.

cybersecurity analyst.title: Cybersecurity Analyst
cybersecurity analyst.description: Protect an organization's computer networks and systems from unauthorized access, cyberattacks, and data breaches.
daily_tasks: Monitor network traffic for security breaches and investigate violations.
Install and operate vulnerability scanning tools and firewalls.
Conduct penetration testing to find system weaknesses before attackers do.
Prepare reports documenting security incidents and assessing damage.
Educate staff on cybersecurity best practices and phishing threats.

cloud architect.title: Cloud Architect
cloud architect.description: Design and manage an organization's cloud computing architecture to ensure scalable, secure, and highly available infrastructure.
daily_tasks: Design cloud architectures for new applications.
Migrate on-premise infrastructure to AWS, GCP, or Azure.
Monitor cloud resource utilization and optimize costs.
Implement cloud security policies and access controls.
Automate infrastructure provisioning using Infrastructure as Code (IaC).

devops engineer.title: DevOps Engineer
devops engineer.description: Bridge the gap between software development and IT operations to streamline deployment and ensure system reliability.
daily_tasks: Build and maintain continuous integration and continuous deployment (CI/CD) pipelines.
Automate server configuration and deployment processes.
Monitor application performance and system health.
Manage cloud infrastructure scaling and load balancing.
Respond to live production incidents and perform root-cause analysis.
hard_skills: CI/CD Tools (Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions)

chief technology officer.title: Chief Technology Officer (CTO)
chief technology officer.description: Lead the technology or engineering department, ensuring the tech strategy aligns with the company's overall business goals.
daily_tasks: Define the organization's overarching technical vision and roadmap.
Oversee the development, implementation, and maintenance of all IT systems.
Manage the engineering budget and vendor relationships.
Scale the engineering and data teams through aggressive hiring and mentoring.
Ensure enterprise compliance with data security and privacy regulations.

accountant.title: Accountant
accountant.description: Prepare, maintain, and examine financial records, ensuring accuracy and compliance with legal and taxation guidelines.
daily_tasks: Reconcile bank statements and balance sheets.
Prepare monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.
Compute taxes owed and prepare tax returns, ensuring compliance with payment, reporting, and other tax requirements.
Audit financial documents and procedures to spot errors or fraud.
Advise management on cost reduction, revenue enhancement, and profit maximization.

financial analyst.title: Financial Analyst
financial analyst.description: Analyze financial data, identify market trends, and make recommendations to organizations regarding business decisions and investments.
daily_tasks: Analyze past results, perform variance analysis, and identify trends.
Evaluate financial performance by comparing and analyzing actual results with plans and forecasts.
Create complex financial models for forecasting and valuation (DCF).
Monitor foreign exchange markets and interest rates to manage corporate risk.
Prepare detailed presentations for executives outlining investment strategies.

investment banker.title: Investment Banker
investment banker.description: Help corporations, governments, and other groups raise capital through issuing securities (debt or equity) and assist in mergers and acquisitions (M&A).
daily_tasks: Analyze financial statements and create complex financial models (e.g., LBO, DCF).
Prepare pitch books and presentations for prospective clients.
Conduct extensive valuation and due diligence for M&A transactions.
Structure complex financial transactions and debt offerings.
Monitor capital markets and industry trends to identify potential deals.

digital marketing manager.title: Digital Marketing Manager
digital marketing manager.description: Develop, implement, and manage marketing campaigns that promote a company's products and services on digital platforms.
daily_tasks: Plan and execute all digital marketing, including SEO/SEM, marketing database, email, social media, and display advertising campaigns.
Measure and report the performance of all digital marketing campaigns against goals (ROI and KPIs).
Identify daily trends and insights to optimize ad spend and performance.
Brainstorm new, creative growth strategies and landing page optimizations.
Perform A/B testing on ad copies and marketing channels.

content writer.title: Content Writer
content writer.description: Produce engaging, clear text for different advertising channels, such as websites, print ads, and catalogs.
daily_tasks: Write clear, attractive copy with a distinct voice for various mediums.
Conduct high-quality research and interviews to inform content.
Edit and proofread copy to ensure perfection before publication.
Use SEO principles to maximize copy's reach online.
Collaborate with designers, PR, and marketing teams on large-scale campaigns.

seo specialist.title: SEO Specialist
seo specialist.description: Implement strategies, tactics, and instructions to increase the amount of visitors to a website by obtaining a high-ranking placement in the search results page of a search engine.
daily_tasks: Execute tests, collect and analyze data and results to identify trends and insights in order to achieve maximum ROI in paid search campaigns.
Track, report, and analyze website analytics and PPC initiatives and campaigns.
Manage campaign expenses, staying on budget, estimating monthly costs and reconciling discrepancies.
Perform ongoing keyword discovery, expansion and optimization.
Research and implement search engine optimization recommendations.

hr manager.title: Human Resources Manager
hr manager.description: Plan, direct, and coordinate the administrative and employee-focused functions of an organization.
daily_tasks: Oversee the recruiting, interviewing, and hiring of new staff.
Handle employee relations counseling, outplacement counseling, and exit interviewing.
Manage compensation, benefits, and performance appraisal systems.
Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local country (e.g., Sri Lankan Labour) employment laws.
Develop training and development initiatives for staff progression.

project manager.title: Project Manager
project manager.description: Plan, procure, and execute projects, ensuring they are completed on time, within budget, and to the required quality standards.
daily_tasks: Determine and define project scope, objectives, and specific deliverables.
Predict resources needed to reach objectives and manage resources effectively.
Develop and manage a detailed project schedule and work plan.
Provide project updates on a consistent basis to various stakeholders about strategy, adjustments, and progress.
Utilize industry best practices, techniques, and standards throughout entire project execution.
hard_skills: Project Management Software (JIRA, MS Project, Asana)

talent acquisition specialist.title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
talent acquisition specialist.description: Identify, attract, interview, and hire top talent to meet the staffing needs of an organization.
daily_tasks: Source candidates using databases, social media, and professional networks.
Conduct initial screening interviews and assess applicant qualifications.
Coordinate interviews with hiring managers and department heads.
Manage the end-to-end recruitment lifecycle within an ATS (Applicant Tracking System).
Negotiate job offers and facilitate employee onboarding processes.

civil engineer.title: Civil Engineer
civil engineer.description: Design, build, supervise, operate, and maintain large construction projects and systems, including roads, buildings, airports, tunnels, and dams.
daily_tasks: Analyze survey reports, maps, and other data to plan and design projects.
Consider construction costs, government regulations, potential environmental hazards, and other factors in planning stages.
Test building materials, such as concrete, asphalt, or steel, for use in particular projects.
Provide cost estimates for materials, equipment, or labor.
Manage site construction, scheduling labor, and ensuring health and safety protocols.

mechanical engineer.title: Mechanical Engineer
mechanical engineer.description: Design, develop, build, and test mechanical and thermal sensors and devices, including tools, engines, and machines.
daily_tasks: Analyze problems to see how mechanical and thermal devices might help solve the problem.
Design or redesign mechanical and thermal devices using analysis and computer-aided design (CAD).
Investigate equipment failures or difficulties to diagnose faulty operation and to recommend remedies.
Oversee the manufacturing process for the device.
Perform simulations and stress analyses on prototype models.

electrical engineer.title: Electrical Engineer
electrical engineer.description: Design, develop, test, and supervise the manufacturing of electrical equipment, such as electric motors, radar and navigation systems, communications systems, or power generation equipment.
daily_tasks: Design new ways to use electrical power to develop or improve products.
Perform detailed calculations to compute and establish manufacturing, construction, and installation standards and specifications.
Direct the manufacture, installation, and testing of electrical equipment to ensure that products meet specifications and codes.
Investigate customer or public complaints, determine nature and extent of problem, and recommend remedial measures.
Work with project managers on production efforts to ensure that projects are completed satisfactorily, on time, and within budget.

data analyst (healthcare).title: Healthcare Data Analyst
data analyst (healthcare).description: Use data to evaluate healthcare systems, improving patient outcomes, reducing costs, and streamlining hospital operations.
daily_tasks: Analyze electronic health records (EHR) to find patterns in patient care.
Build dashboards tracking hospital admission rates and bed availability.
Ensure all data handling complies with medical privacy regulations (e.g., HIPAA).
Collaborate with doctors and administrators to present cost-saving strategies.
Model epidemic spreads or disease trends across populations.

biomedical engineer.title: Biomedical Engineer
biomedical engineer.description: Combine engineering principles with medical and biological sciences to design and create equipment, devices, computer systems, and software used in healthcare.
daily_tasks: Design equipment and devices, such as artificial internal organs, replacements for body parts, and machines for diagnosing medical problems.
Install, adjust, maintain, repair, or provide technical support for biomedical equipment.
Evaluate the safety, efficiency, and effectiveness of biomedical equipment.
Train clinicians and other personnel on the proper use of equipment.
Work with scientists and researchers to investigate how engineering principles apply to human/biological systems.

account executive.title: Account Executive
account executive.description: Find and close new business opportunities while serving as the primary point of contact for clients, ensuring their long-term satisfaction.
daily_tasks: Identify and prospect new potential clients through cold calling, networking, and social selling.
Conduct product demonstrations and sales presentations designed to address specific client pain points.
Negotiate contract terms and close complex sales deals.
Maintain an accurate pipeline and forecast in the CRM system (e.g., Salesforce).
Collaborate with marketing to generate targeted lead campaigns.

customer success manager.title: Customer Success Manager
customer success manager.description: Ensure customers achieve their desired outcomes using the company's product or service, driving retention and upsell opportunities.
daily_tasks: Onboard new clients and train them on product features.
Conduct regular business reviews (QBRs) to monitor client health and usage metrics.
Proactively identify accounts at risk of churning and implement rescue strategies.
Identify opportunities for upselling or cross-selling additional services.
Act as the voice of the customer, relaying feedback to the product development team.

ui/ux designer.title: UI/UX Designer
ui/ux designer.description: Create intuitive, user-friendly, and aesthetically pleasing digital interfaces for web and mobile applications.
daily_tasks: Conduct user research, interviews, and usability testing.
Create wireframes, storyboards, user flows, and site maps to communicate interaction and design ideas.
Design high-fidelity mockups and interactive prototypes using tools like Figma or Adobe XD.
Collaborate closely with developers to ensure accurate implementation of designs.
Analyze user feedback and behavior to continually improve the product experience.
